query:
UPDATE session_players sp
JOIN (
  SELECT 
    g.sessionId,
    gr.playerId,
    SUM(gr.pointsScored) AS totalScore,
    COUNT(*) AS handsPlayed,
    SUM(CASE WHEN gr.rank = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS handsWon
  FROM game_results gr
  JOIN games g ON g.id = gr.gameId
  WHERE g.isReverted = 0
  GROUP BY g.sessionId, gr.playerId
) computed ON sp.sessionId = computed.sessionId AND sp.playerId = computed.playerId
SET 
  sp.totalScore = computed.totalScore,
  sp.handsPlayed = computed.handsPlayed,
  sp.handsWon = computed.handsWon;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 25EMAuqsXNnxbn4.root --database UFmRayAUKBpWQhew29rCsn --execute UPDATE session_players sp
JOIN (
  SELECT 
    g.sessionId,
    gr.playerId,
    SUM(gr.pointsScored) AS totalScore,
    COUNT(*) AS handsPlayed,
    SUM(CASE WHEN gr.rank = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS handsWon
  FROM game_results gr
  JOIN games g ON g.id = gr.gameId
  WHERE g.isReverted = 0
  GROUP BY g.sessionId, gr.playerId
) computed ON sp.sessionId = computed.sessionId AND sp.playerId = computed.playerId
SET 
  sp.totalScore = computed.totalScore,
  sp.handsPlayed = computed.handsPlayed,
  sp.handsWon = computed.handsWon;
